message:
feat(crash): loop detection with exponential backoff (wa-nu4.4.3.6)

Introduce CrashLoopDetector for identifying repeated crash patterns and
applying graduated backoff delays:

- Tracks crash timestamps within configurable sliding window
- Exponential backoff with capped delays (default: 1s base to 60s max)
- Consecutive crash counter resets on successful run
- Configurable thresholds (default: 3 crashes in 5 minutes = loop detected)
- CrashLoopConfig for per-workflow and per-agent customization

Prevents cascade failures and resource exhaustion when agents or
workflows fail repeatedly, enabling graceful degradation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
